---
title: "Welcome to the blog"
description: "A first post — what this space is for."
author: "Soma S Dhavala"
date: "2026-05-17"
categories: [meta, intro]
---

This is the first post on the relaunched site. Expect notes on
statistics, applied machine learning, teaching, and the occasional
aside on tooling.

The site is built with [Quarto](https://quarto.org). Comments are
powered by [giscus](https://giscus.app) (GitHub Discussions).
